hero.label: Balikpapan’s #1 Minisoccer Stadium
hero.hero_desc: The ultimate home for football enthusiasts. Experience professional-grade facilities, world-class atmosphere, and the spirit of the game.

about.desc: Borneo Anfield Stadium (BAS) redefines the standard of mini soccer fields in East Kalimantan. Strategically located on AMD LIII Street, we deliver world-class facilities for the local community.
about.point1_desc: Two 60x40m fields with selected synthetic grass, designed for maximum performance in 9 vs 9 format.
about.point2_desc: Complete with café, exclusive watching area, and professional equipment rental services.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.desc: Premium facilities for a comfortable and professional playing experience
facilities.locker_desc: Comfortable & secure changing room for players
facilities.cafe_desc: Relax and hang out while watching matches

booking.title: Booking
booking.headline: Open & Transparent Schedule
booking.desc: Check match slots in real-time and book instantly without hassle. Everything is integrated for a more professional playing experience.
